name: Chocolaty Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
2. Add the ground beef to the skillet. Break up any lumps with a fork and cook, stirring occasionally, until the meat is evenly browned.
3. Stir in the kidney beans, tomato puree, tomato paste, green chiles, water, 1 ounce of the bittersweet chocolate, red chile, cumin, and beef bouillon cube. Mix well. Bring to a boil, then lower heat and simmer, uncovered, for 30 minutes. Stir occasionally.
4. Stir in the remaining bittersweet chocolate and continue cooking until it is thoroughly blended. Taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
